recent_bad_license_projects.name: mkapidocs
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: Automated documentation setup tool for Python projects using MkDocs with GitHub Pages or GitLab Pages. Intelligently detects project features (C/C++ code, Typer CLI, private registries) and generates comprehensive MkDocs documentation with Material theme, API references, CI/CD workflows, and docstring linting configuration.
